title: No Bed Here, Kitty
description: A simple server-side Fabric mod that stops cats from going to the obstructed beds
body:
Ever lost your cat in some random village because it got stuck near the house trying to lay on the bed?

This mod fixes just that! Cats won't stop laying on random beds as they do, but if the path to the bed is obstructed - the bed will simply be ignored. So make sure the doors are closed
